title: Can cheek filler make the face appear slimmer？
filename: Can cheek filler make the face appear slimmer？.en.vtt

segments.text: can cheek filler give the appearance of a slimmer face [Music] well yes it is possible even though you're making something bigger you can make it look slimmer and this is because curvatures in face of in the face are a big part of what makes it look full around so if you have a fuller lower cheek and a small upper cheek so the zygoma is relatively small you look rounder and if you add volume in those areas higher up you can create a flatter facial plane so the cheek plane is now more it's flatter the zygoma's then now the high point of the face leading on to the chin and it gives the impression of having the skeleton more dominant than the fat pads and essentially that's what being slim means is that the skeleton is dominant the fat pads are less dominant so yes adding filler can make you look slimmer in the right place in the right patient so hope that helps good question [Music]
